mapper.sql: b.banner_id, b.title, b.image_type, b.link_type, b.link_value, b.display_order, b.start_date, b.end_date, b.is_active, b.created_by, b.created_at, b.updated_by, b.updated_at, CASE WHEN b.link_type = 'STORE' THEN s.store_name WHEN b.link_type = 'COUPON' THEN c.coupon_name ELSE NULL END AS link_target_name, CASE WHEN b.link_type = 'STORE' THEN b.link_value WHEN b.link_type = 'COUPON' THEN CAST(c.store_id AS CHAR) ELSE NULL END AS link_store_id

LEFT JOIN tb_store s ON b.link_type = 'STORE' AND b.link_value REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND s.store_id = CAST(b.link_value AS UNSIGNED) LEFT JOIN tb_coupon c ON b.link_type = 'COUPON' AND b.link_value REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND c.coupon_id = CAST(b.link_value AS UNSIGNED)
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM tb_banner b
WHERE b.is_deleted = 0
AND b.is_active = #{isActive}
ORDER BY b.display_order ASC, b.created_at DESC

SELECT FROM tb_banner b
WHERE b.banner_id = #{bannerId} AND b.is_deleted = 0
SELECT image AS banner_image, image_type FROM tb_banner WHERE banner_id = #{bannerId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_banner (title, image, image_type, link_type, link_value, display_order, start_date, end_date, is_active, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{bannerImage, jdbcType=BLOB}, #{imageType}, #{linkType}, #{linkValue}, #{displayOrder}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{isActive}, #{createdBy}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_banner SET title = #{title}, link_type = #{linkType}, link_value = #{linkValue}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, is_active = #{isActive},
image = #{bannerImage, jdbcType=BLOB}, image_type = #{imageType},
updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE banner_id = #{bannerId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_banner SET is_active = #{isActive}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE banner_id = #{bannerId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_banner SET display_order = #{displayOrder}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE banner_id = #{bannerId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_banner SET is_deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE banner_id = #{bannerId}
mapper.select: SELECT b.banner_id, b.title, b.image_type, b.link_type, b.link_value, b.display_order, CASE WHEN b.link_type = 'COUPON' THEN CAST(c.store_id AS CHAR) ELSE NULL END AS link_store_id FROM tb_banner b LEFT JOIN tb_coupon c ON b.link_type = 'COUPON' AND b.link_value REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND c.coupon_id = CAST(b.link_value AS UNSIGNED) WHERE b.is_active = 1 AND b.is_deleted = 0 AND (b.start_date IS NULL OR b.start_date <= CURDATE()) AND (b.end_date IS NULL OR b.end_date >= CURDATE()) ORDER BY b.display_order ASC, b.created_at DESC
